Design Library › Video › Blick Brand Explainer

Blick Brand Explainerv1

30s 16:9 1920×1080 iteration 2026-04-27

Purpose

30-second brand explainer for blick.group — introduces Blick to new visitors, covers what we do, why choose us, and ends with a clear CTA.

Audience

Prospective drilling customers in AU/NZ. Owner-operators and site managers, 40s–60s, practical and direct.

Scenes

0–10s
Hero
"Better drilling starts here."
Orange sweep wipe reveals headline on black. Tagline + sub-copy. Brand confidence play.
10–22s
Three Pillars
"Quality that performs / There when you need us / Your expert partner"
Dark background, three cards stagger in. Maps directly to brand voice pillars from Brand Voice Guide.
22–30s
Close
"Your wins are our wins."
Full orange close. Strong brand colour finish. blick.group URL. Brand tagline quote.

Brand

Font: Nunito Sans (Proxima Nova substitute — web safe)
Voice: Expert mate — confident, plain-spoken, field-focused

Next Steps

  • Review scene timing — is 12s on pillars long enough to read?
  • Add Blick logo SVG asset (currently B lettermark only)
  • Consider adding a field photography background to Scene 1
  • Render to MP4 once approved: cd blick-explainer && npx hyperframes render
  • Decide on music/voiceover — silent or narrated?
Render to MP4
cd /Volumes/NewmanDrive/development/blick-explainer && HYPERFRAMES_NO_TELEMETRY=1 npx hyperframes render
